proposals.current_short: The Columbia 2″ Angleheads are a tool we are especially proud of. They stand atop our overbuilt lineup of products with their beautiful looks...
proposals.current_description: The Columbia 2″ Angleheads are a tool we are especially proud of. They stand atop our overbuilt lineup of products with their beautiful looks and construction. But above all their beauty, in the corner is all that matters, and they do not disappoint. Whether you are running behind the Corner Roller or skimming on a Corner Box these tools deliver great corner. They run like they are on ice and leave a finish that is ready to paint.

proposals.current_short: Columbia 36" 180-Grip Bent Box Handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span. Grips the axle with a tremendous a...
proposals.current_description: Columbia 36" 180-Grip Bent Box Handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span. Grips the axle with a tremendous amount of pressure to eliminates the possibility of slippage when dealing with difficult angle situations. As a result, this produces cleaner, quicker and more efficient application of joint compound. A very versatile design that provides the best possible braking at any angle. The bent handle design adds necessary leverage in all situations, and truly excels on butt-joints and headers.

proposals.current_short: The New 36" Feather Weight 180º handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span. Grips the axle with a tremen...
proposals.current_description: The New 36" Feather Weight 180º handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span. Grips the axle with a tremendous amount of pressure to eliminate the possibility of slippage when dealing with difficult angle situations. As a result, this produces cleaner, quicker and more efficient application of joint compound. A very versatile design that provides the best possible braking at any angle. Extra strong billet aluminum design for years of rugged usage. Less moving parts mean less breakdowns.

proposals.current_short: The 7″ Throttle Box is another great product of ours that offers years of great performance. All billet construction with a threaded stainles...
proposals.current_description: The 7″ Throttle Box is another great product of ours that offers years of great performance. All billet construction with a threaded stainless steel ball, this Corner Box looks and operates seamlessly. All our Corner Boxes now come standard with automatic capabilities, making pushing the box at least 50% easier than standard boxes. The new springs have adjustable tensions and greatly reduce the occurence of air pockets while running. The Throttle Box allows the corners to be quickly coated with your choice of angle head or applicator head. *Patent Pending

proposals.current_short: Our Cam Lock Tube is so simple and so positive we would not recommend using any other tube when it comes to fast set compounds. The brass cams easi...
proposals.current_description: Our Cam Lock Tube is so simple and so positive we would not recommend using any other tube when it comes to fast set compounds. The brass cams easily find and lock to the stainless ring using the same technology as a firehose.

proposals.current_short: Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort,...
proposals.current_description: Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort, and performance. Crafted from heavy-gauge stainless steel, this mud pan is built to withstand the toughest tasks, while its watertight, laser-welded seams ensure long-lasting reliability. With tapered ends and sides for a secure grip, this tool is ready to handle any job with ease. Plus, every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a free soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use.

proposals.parent_name: Columbia Fat Boy Automatic Assist Drywall Flat Box
proposals.current_short: Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Finishing Boxes in the world. The Automatic Flat Boxes reduce the need to push the compound on to...
proposals.current_description: Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Finishing Boxes in the world. The Automatic Flat Boxes reduce the need to push the compound on to the wall. By engaging, the box springs put pressure on the compound chamber requiring only a light push to operate the box. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Finishing Box we make exceeds your expectations.

proposals.current_short: Columbia Taping Tools 8" Automatic Assist Drywall Flat Finisher Box features precision joint compound metering adjustment for top quality fini...
proposals.current_description: Columbia Taping Tools 8" Automatic Assist Drywall Flat Finisher Box features precision joint compound metering adjustment for top quality finish surfaces on drywall butt joints and flat seams. Integrated door axle and pressure plate system allows smooth, easy operation and quick access for easy cleanup! New, ultra-reliable door plate wiper resists expansion or deterioration, for long-term ease of operation and greater reliability.

proposals.parent_name: Columbia Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box
proposals.current_short: High capacity Inside Track FatBoy box holds 30% more mud compound than standard flat box, for less trips back to the loading pump. Compatible with...
proposals.current_description: High capacity Inside Track FatBoy box holds 30% more mud compound than standard flat box, for less trips back to the loading pump. Compatible with all leading brands of drywall flat box finisher brake handles, and quick clean feature allows convenient access to clean without removing pressure plate. 8" box is excellent for applying the base coat of mud to drywall flat seams and is super effective when finishing butt joints.

proposals.current_short: The Columbia 2″ Nailspotter is a big improvement in screw finishing. It has the option of having wheels or the traditional skid plate. It is...
proposals.current_description: The Columbia 2″ Nailspotter is a big improvement in screw finishing. It has the option of having wheels or the traditional skid plate. It is light weight and has an easy to adjust thumb screw for swivel tension. By far the best Nailspotter on the market.

proposals.current_short: Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothi...
proposals.current_description: Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no means does this product replace the Tomahawk’s being our premium option. It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. The body profile remains the same as the Tomahawk’s but is made from high quality plastic rather than billet aluminum.
